effectiveDatetime.description: The effective date and time of the cancellation.

reason.description: The reason for the cancellation. See `SarCancellationReason` for all supported values.

quantity.description: The number of units affected by the cancellation.

terminationDatetime.description: The date and time the holder's relationship with the issuer was terminated. Only present for TERMINATED cancellation events.

forfeitureDatetime.description: The date and time unvested units were forfeited. Only present for TERMINATION_FORFEITED cancellation events.

schema_def.description: A cancellation or termination transaction for a SAR.
